changed_axis: Train a hand-conditioned opponent action likelihood model for Bayesian hand-belief updates
result_summary: Completed full training and held-out evaluation. The model achieved mean_action_accuracy 0.8038, mean_belief_top1_accuracy 0.7424, belief_top1_lift +0.1837 over the card-removal prior, and true_hand_probability_lift +0.1581. Performance was strongest against value-based and modulated-value style opponents and weakest against CFR, but belief updates remained positive against every held-out target.
